spoedafspraak: Same-day guaranteed for emergencies. The assistant assesses the urgency. The practice assistants will briefly ask about the reason for your visit to estimate the urgency and consultation duration. They maintain professional confidentiality.
dubbelConsult: For multiple complaints or mental health issues. Request this when booking the appointment.
videoconsult: Available with GPs and mental health practice nurses via a secure connection.
terugbelafspraken: You can request a callback appointment to avoid waiting times. Leave your message on the voicemail and end with #. The phone system is available 24 hours for repeat prescriptions and appointment cancellations.
afspraakAfzeggen: Cancel your appointment by phone at least 24 hours in advance. For appointments with the mental health practice nurse: at least 48 hours in advance.
